description: For the Mid-2011 Mac Mini (11A2061) and Mid-2011 MacBook Air (11A2063). Available on Lion Internet Recovery (<kbd>⌘ Cmd</kbd>+<kbd>⌥ Opt</kbd>+<kbd>R</kbd> upon reboot on Mid-2011 or later Macs)
For the Mid-2011 Mac mini and Mid-2011 MacBook Air. Same as general 10.7.1, plus fixes for the MacBook Air display and power, and a fix for the Mac mini SD card slot.
General operating system fixes, Safari 5.1.3, adds Catalan, Croatian, Greek, Hebrew, Romanian, Slovak, Thai, and Ukrainian language support.
General operating system fixes, improved SMB file copying reliability, Safari 5.1.6.
General operating system fixes, Safari 5.1.7, adds Gatekeeper.
